headline: From Slide to Surge: How West Pharmaceutical Services Reclaimed Its Mojo in 2026
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE: WST) has ripped 24.2% in the past month and 8.7% in the past week, and the move has the fingerprints of a sustained re-rating. After a multi-year drawdown that left the stock with a five-year return of −5.7%, the injectable-containment specialist has flipped the script with a Q1 2026 print so ...
